content:
In the review for the file APIs used by Binder, I received the following comment:

So the explicitly deferred close is due to how binder works so it's not much of a general purpose interface as I don't recall having other codepaths with similar problems. So this should live in the binder specific rust code imo.

What do you all suggest I do? Do we have a good place to put such things?
I have another case of bindings to an API that aren't really going to be used by anyone else. It was page_range.rs in the RFC.
